heading: Imposition of sanctions under Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act
label: 10504 Imposition of sanctions under Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act
notes: References in TextThe Global Magnitsky Human Rights Accountability Act, referred to in subsec. (a), is subtitle F (§§ 1261–1264) of title XII of div. A of , , , which is classified generally to chapter 108 (§ 10101 et seq.) of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. children.text: in all countries identified pursuant to ; andsection 10502(b) of this title
in relation to the planning or construction or any operation of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline.
a list of foreign persons with respect to which the President imposed sanctions pursuant to the evaluation under subsection (a);
the dates on which such sanctions were imposed;
the reasons for imposing such sanctions; and
a list of all foreign persons that have engaged in significant corruption in relation to the planning, construction, or operation of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline.

children.heading: Form of report
children.label: c Form of report
children.text: Each report required by subsection (b) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may include a classified annex.

children.heading: Briefing in lieu of report
children.label: d Briefing in lieu of report
children.text: The Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, may, instead of submitting a written report required under subsection (b) (except with respect to the list required by subsection (b)(4)), provide to the appropriate congressional committees a briefing, together with a written justification, if doing so would better serve the national interests of the United States.

children.heading: Termination of requirements relating to Nord Stream 2
children.label: e Termination of requirements relating to Nord Stream 2
children.text: The requirements under subsections (a)(2) and (b)(4) shall terminate on the date that is 5 years after .December 22, 2023
